title: Portsea Repairs Complete
content:
^^^Portsea is feeling loved again^^^

Thanks to **Plumb**, **Matt** and a **Mottley Crew** of helpers, **Portsea** is no longer in danger of sliding into the sea. The retaining wall is back, the gravel in place and they saved a bit to make the path all shiny and new.

![Before](/uploads/content-351c95bc29396f45-1200x800.jpg)
::Before::

![After](/uploads/content-6eeb98b80d1548e8-1200x800.jpg)
::After::

![Mottley Crew](/uploads/content-be0d7f06b4cf0ed0-1200x800.jpg)
::Mottly Crew::

**Thanks Guy's for a job well done!**
author: SkyHigh Committee
